suggestions.title: No ARIA labels or keyboard navigation on interactive elements
suggestions.description: The tab toggle buttons lack aria-selected/role='tab'. Worker cards and activity log entries have no semantic structure. Screen readers would struggle. Add role='tablist'/'tab'/'tabpanel', aria-labels on stat cards, and semantic headings.

suggestions.title: GitHub API polling every 10s will hit rate limits
suggestions.description: Unauthenticated GitHub API allows 60 requests/hour. With 2 endpoints polled every 10s, that's 720 req/hr — 12x the limit. Either add ETags/conditional requests, increase interval to 60s+, or use a CDN-cached raw URL (raw.githubusercontent.com) which doesn't count against API limits.

suggestions.title: Office view characters overlap on narrow screens
suggestions.description: Desk positions use fixed percentages. On screens < 600px the office floor becomes too small and characters stack on top of each other, names become unreadable. Need responsive scaling or a minimum floor width with horizontal scroll.

suggestions.title: No way to see what a worker is doing from the Office tab
suggestions.description: The Office view shows characters at desks but doesn't display their current task or progress. Users have to switch to Dashboard to see details. Add a hover tooltip or click-to-expand on office characters showing task + progress.

suggestions.title: Light mode office floor looks washed out
suggestions.description: The light theme floor color (#e6e6f0) makes desk monitors (#b4b4cc) nearly invisible. Low contrast between floor, desks, and monitors. Darken desk surfaces or add stronger borders in light mode.

suggestions.title: Activity log entries use array index as React key
suggestions.description: In ActivityLog, entries use `key={i}` which causes unnecessary re-renders when new entries are prepended. Each activity entry should have a unique ID (timestamp + type + worker combo or a UUID).

suggestions.title: No loading state on initial fetch
suggestions.description: When the page first loads, it shows the empty state ('Everyone's off the clock') for a brief flash before data arrives. Add a skeleton loader or spinner for the initial load.

suggestions.title: Stats bar shows only active workers, not total roster
suggestions.description: The 'On the Clock' stat only counts active workers. It'd be more informative to show total roster size too, e.g. '2/5 On the Clock'. Gives a sense of team utilization.

suggestions.title: Add sound effects or browser notifications for worker status changes
suggestions.description: When a worker clocks in/out or completes a task, a subtle notification sound or browser notification would make the 'live monitor' feel truly alive. Optional toggle in settings.

suggestions.title: Coffee corner is decorative but could be interactive
suggestions.description: The coffee corner is a cute touch but does nothing. Could show a counter of how many coffees consumed today, or have idle workers occasionally wander to it. Small delight factor.
